name: pi-graph-viz
description_en: Interactive dependency graph visualizer for Pi. Renders AST call graphs (from pi-impact-analyzer or any JSON) as self-contained HTML with cycle detection and hierarchical layout.
description_zh: Pi 的交互式依赖图可视化工具。将 AST 调用图（来自 pi-impact-analyzer 或任何 JSON）渲染为具有循环检测和分层布局的独立 HTML
